positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized composition featuring fantastical bioluminescent forest elements and fauna. Central focus on interwoven glowing leaves, delicate moth silhouettes, and abstract crystalline structures floating through a mystical forest canopy. Dominant color palette must be deep midnight indigo and sapphire blue, contrasted sharply with electric cyan, glowing teal, and soft lavender accents. The artwork must feature strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast suitable for screen printing. Minimalist yet detailed illustration, perfect for apparel transfer.
negative: blur, lowres, worst quality, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, noise, disfigured, photorealism, gradients, writing
